title: spermacoce intricans
intro: Spermacoce intricans, also known as the red button vine or red button plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Spermacoce intricans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
